overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter video game showing a student character in Gryffindor robes exploring Hogwarts castle. The character walks through stone corridors, passes another student, descends a spiral staircase, and explores a dimly lit brick dungeon area with barrels and paintings.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper castle corridor with tower view

events.description: character turns away from window overlooking the tower and enters the interior corridor
passing a magical portrait with green glowing flame on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone corridor away from the tower window, passing architectural details and a magical portrait

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking toward the player character in the corridor

entered.detail: tall stone tower with multiple windows visible through the corridor opening
framed portrait with green magical flame illuminating the base
large ornate ceramic urn against the far wall
opening leading to the descending spiral staircase

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a window overlooking a tall stone tower, then walks along an upper castle corridor with stone walls and Gothic arches. The character passes a magical portrait with green flame and approaches a spiral staircase, encountering another student walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: entering the spiral staircase structure and beginning descent
walls transition from smooth stone to exposed red brick as the descent continues

agents.ego_description: descending the winding spiral staircase, following the curve downward

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with wooden handrail curving downward
red brick walls emerging as the descent continues deeper
lit wall-mounted torches providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character descends a winding spiral staircase with stone steps and a wooden handrail. As the descent continues, the walls transition from smooth stone to exposed red brick, and the lighting shifts from natural to warm artificial torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: brick dungeon corridor with storage barrels

events.description: exiting the spiral staircase into the brick-lined dungeon corridor
passing wall display niches containing pumpkins and bread

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit brick corridor, following another student in the distance

notable_agents.action: student walking ahead in the corridor, gradually moving further away

entered.detail: long corridor with red brick walls and high vaulted ceilings
ornate iron chandeliers hanging from the ceiling
stacked wooden storage barrels lining the corridor walls
framed portraits and paintings mounted on the brick walls
large round wooden cask with metal bands
recessed wall niche displaying pumpkins and bread loaves

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairs into a long brick dungeon corridor, the character walks beneath vaulted ceilings with iron chandeliers. The corridor features wooden barrels, wall paintings, and display niches with food items. Another student walks ahead in the distance as the character explores the dimly lit storage area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the airy, light-filled upper corridors of the castle down into the dim, subterranean depths of a brick dungeon. It begins near a window overlooking a tall stone tower, moving past Gothic arches and a magical portrait with green flames before encountering another student near a spiral staircase. As the character descends the winding stone steps, the environment gradually shifts from smooth masonry to exposed red brick while the natural light fades into the warm glow of artificial torchlight. The scene then opens into a long dungeon corridor with vaulted ceilings and iron chandeliers, passing wooden barrels and food displays in the wall niches. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the dimly lit storage area, trailing another student who walks ahead in the distance.
